title: Cadiz and RIC Energy Partner to Build the Largest Hydrogen Production Facility in California
content: Cadiz, Inc. and RIC Energy announced plans to build Californiaâ€™s largest green hydrogen facility at Cadiz Ranch in the Mojave Desert, producing 50,000 kg of hydrogen daily using solar energy and Cadiz water resources. Strategically located near rail and highway infrastructure, the facility will serve Southern Californiaâ€™s zero-emission transport and industry needs. The project, part of Californiaâ€™s clean hydrogen initiatives under ARCHES, supports the stateâ€™s clean energy targets and is expected to contribute significantly to job creation and economic growth.
author: Analysts Account
